Package org.springdoc.core.providers

Class ActuatorProvider

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.providers.ActuatorProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware
public abstract class ActuatorProvider extends Object implements org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextAware
The type Actuator provider.
Author:
bnasslahsen
